name: Star Fall
descriptionTemplate: When commanding troops to attack, there is a X% chance to trigger a Level II satellite strike on the target. When commanding air hover units, the damage dealt by this satellite strike is increased by an extra 30%.

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding troops to attack, there is a 20% chance to trigger a Level II satellite strike on the target. When commanding air hover units, the damage dealt by this satellite strike is increased by an extra 30%.
progression.renderedDescFr: When commanding troops to attaque, there is a 20% chance to trigger a niveau II satellite strike on the cible. When commanding air hover unités, the dégâts dealt by this satellite strike is augmenté by an extra 30%.
